The word "Доступ" in Ukrainian translates to "Access" in English.

Adding the word "Дозволено", which means "Allowed" or "Permitted", to "Доступ" would result in the phrase "Доступ Дозволено". 

So, the combined translation is: "Access Allowed" or "Permission Granted".
